title: Generative AI for Beginners
description: Authored 2 lessons in Microsoft's Generative AI for Beginners curriculum — a hands-on course teaching the fundamentals of building generative AI applications.

title: Data Science for Beginners
description: Contributed the Data Ethics lesson and created sketchnotes for Microsoft's Data Science for Beginners curriculum.

title: IoT for Beginners
description: Created sketchnotes for Microsoft's IoT for Beginners curriculum — a 12-week, 24-lesson course visualizing key concepts across the lesson series.

title: Observe, Optimize & Protect Your Hosted Agents in Microsoft Foundry
description: Authored LAB540, a hands-on workshop teaching attendees to observe, optimize, and protect hosted agents in Microsoft Foundry — covering tracing, evaluations, and responsible AI.

title: Automate Model Selection with Microsoft Foundry Model Router
description: Authored session LTG153, a guided lab on automating model selection using the Microsoft Foundry model router.

title: Observe, Manage & Scale Agentic AI Apps with Microsoft Foundry
description: Authored PREL13, a hands-on workshop on observing, managing, and scaling agentic AI apps with Microsoft Foundry.

title: Build Trustworthy AI with Systematic Evaluations in Microsoft Foundry
description: Authored LTG151, a session on building trustworthy AI with systematic evaluations in Microsoft Foundry — covering quality, safety, agent, and custom evaluators.

title: Build Smarter AI Systems in Foundry as Models and Costs Evolve
description: Authored BRK230, a Microsoft Build 2026 breakout on building smarter AI systems in Microsoft Foundry — hill-climbing across quality, cost, and latency with a model playbook.

title: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript: Building the Web
description: Instructor for this LinkedIn Learning course teaching the tools of web development — getting started coding in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Evaluate Reasoning Models for Your Generative AI Solutions
description: Authored LAB333, a hands-on workshop on evaluating reasoning models for generative AI solutions.

title: Evaluate & Improve the Quality and Safety of Your AI Applications
description: Authored LAB334, a hands-on workshop on evaluating and improving the quality and safety of AI applications.

title: Safeguard Agentic AI Solutions with the AI Red Teaming Agent
description: Authored LTG156, a session on safeguarding agentic AI solutions using the AI Red Teaming Agent.
